mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in RSAFS signals improving household demand and near-term revenue momentum, raising expected S&P 500 earnings and producing positive forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot RSAFS value was available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more often than baseline, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in FEDFUNDS tightens discount rates and financing conditions, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.50 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot FEDFUNDS value was available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if average triggered returns are not below unconditional returns at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in UNRATE and slowdown in PAYEMS growth signals weakening labor income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.30 percentage points over 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month growth decelerates versus the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger has no lower 60-day return distribution than non-triggered periods by a one-sided test at p < 0.05, or if the interaction term is insignificant in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving production and operating leverage, which supports cyclicals and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot INDPRO value was available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum is not associated with higher 5-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum in at least 60% of walk-forward windows, or if Rank IC is persistently below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals contraction in interest-rate-sensitive housing demand and future construction activity, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% year over year
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot HOUST value was available as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if year-over-year HOUST declines greater than 10% are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in fewer than 50% of cases, or if triggered mean returns exceed unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: High CPIAUCSL inflation combined with rising FEDFUNDS signals policy tightening into an inflation shock, increasing real-rate and margin pressure and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds 4% and FEDFUNDS rises over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the combined CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS trigger does not underperform periods with high inflation alone or tightening alone, or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: An upward crossing in UNRATE signals that labor slack is rising fast enough to challenge consumption and earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 12-month moving average by more than 0.20 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot UNRATE value was available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE upward-crossing events are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of instances, or if hit-rate improvement over baseline is less than 5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDPC1 growth paired with decelerating CPIAUCSL inflation signals real demand resilience without worsening discount-rate pressure, supporting earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation momentum declines versus the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-growth and disinflation trigger fails to produce higher 60-day returns than unconditional periods at p < 0.05, or if the interaction effect is not positive in rolling out-of-sample tests.
